steps.title: Sign in to Azure Portal
steps.instruction: Sign in to the Azure portal at https://portal.azure.com and dismiss the Welcome to Azure splash screen by selecting Cancel.
steps.aiResponse:
I'm unable to execute this step. The environment has no working shell — **PowerShell 6+ (pwsh) is not installed**, which blocks all command execution including:

- Launching the Playwright MCP browser
- Navigating to the Azure portal
- Taking screenshots
- Any browser automation whatsoever

```
ACTIONS_TAKEN: None — shell unavailable (pwsh not installed)
STEP_COMPLETED: NO
ELEMENT_FOUND: N/A
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: None
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: None
BLOCKING_ISSUES: PowerShell 6+ (pwsh.exe) is not installed. All tool execution is blocked. Install from https://aka.ms/powershell then retry.
CURRENT_STATE: No browser launched — cannot execute any commands
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: SKIPPED
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: SKIPPED
```

**To unblock**, install PowerShell 7 on this machine. From an admin command prompt:

```cmd
winget install Microsoft.PowerShell
```

Or download the MSI from https://aka.ms/powershell. After install, retry this step.
